svg.title: If You Ask — app icon source (v3)
svg.desc: Hand-of-cards icon for the If You Ask iOS/Android app. Version C card order: green (Just Vibing) at the back, gold (Wait What?) in the middle, terracotta (Dig Deep) just behind a blank white question card layered on top as the fourth card in the fan. Cream background. 1024x1024 square canvas, no rounded corners (iOS applies the mask automatically).
